notes: Real-record pair. Pushkin Russian aggregate (1690010, contains 'Dubrovski' as a 505 component) vs Pushkin Finnish aggregate (2371438, primary work 'Aatelisrosvo Dubrovskij'). Same conceptual work at the component level; main-entry titles differ because both records are aggregates.

Real-record pair. Kate Morton's 'The Secret Keeper' translated into Swedish (2080863) and into Finnish (2297829). Both records carry uniform title 'The secret keeper' in 240. Cleanest translation pair in the bootstrap set.

Bootstrap-synthesized pair: same Pushkin work (Dubrovskij) catalogued with Cyrillic-script main entry vs Latin-transliterated main entry. Tests whether the embedder bridges Cyrillic and Latin orthography for the same author + title.

Curated Finnish translation of Kate Morton's 'The Clockmaker's Daughter' (2372028) paired with a synthesized English-original record. Replace record_a with a real Helmet English-edition bib if/when one shows up in the corpus.

Curated Hungarian film 'Natural light' (2564382) is an adaptation of Závada Pál's novel 'Természetes fény' (catalogued as the source via 700 $i 'Elokuvaversion perustana (teos)'). Adaptation pair: same source story, different works (novel vs film). Source-novel record_a is synthesized; replace if the original-novel bib is added to the corpus.

Curated children's book 'Sagor från Mumindalen' (2360958) is an abridgement-after-three-novels by Tove Jansson. Pair against a synthesized full-novel record. Different works at the RDA level — abridgements with substantial creative reworking are different works.

record_a.creator: Jansson, Tove,
record_a.title: Trollkarlens hatt
record_a.notes: Source novel referenced by 2360958's 700 $i 'Verk baserat på:'

notes: Real-record pair from the curated 13. Steven Wilson rock-album sound recording (2452306) vs Mozart piano sheet music (2616222). Different works AND different content types — exercises BFFI subclass routing as well as embedding discrimination.
Real-record cross-genre pair from the curated 13. Finnish-original prose monograph (2628274) vs English-language rock album (2452306). Trivially different.

Real-record cross-genre pair. Finnish Pushkin translation (2371438, txt) vs Big Country anthology (2484550, sound recording with corporate-body main entry). Tests author + content-type discrimination.
Real-record cross-genre pair. Mozart piano score (2616222) vs PS5 video game (2576727, computer file with no main entry). Tests handling of missing creator + unusual carrier types.

Real-record pair. Both records are Pushkin Russian-original aggregates, but contain different works (Onegin/Proza compilation vs the picture book 'Po stranitsam Puškina'). Hardest discrimination case — same author, same language, both txt — that the embedder must NOT flag as same_work.

Real-record pair. Pushkin Russian works: 'Jevgeni Onegin ; Proza' compilation (1690010) vs 'Skazki Puškina' fairy-tale collection (2293686). Both Pushkin, both Russian txt, very different works — the kind of pair that defeats simplistic surname-only blocking.

Real-record cross-genre pair. Two translation collections in Finnish: Dickens essays (2620193) vs Pushkin novellas (2371438). Same surface metadata shape (Finnish translation aggregates) but different authors + works — calibrates the embedder's reliance on author tokens.
